name: Arizona EZ-Pawn
description_short: Arizona EZ-Pawn operates two locations in Sun City and Peoria offering fast pawn loans, gold and jewelry buying, and collateral-based lending since 2010.
description_long:
Arizona EZ-Pawn is a locally-operated pawn shop with two locations in the Phoenix metropolitan area—one in Sun City and one in Peoria—serving customers since 2010. The company positions itself as a trusted community lender offering fast access to cash through collateral-based loans, with an emphasis on fair pricing and customer service.

The company offers a broad range of pawn and lending services including instant cash loans against personal items, buying and selling of gold and jewelry, firearms and ammunition sales, and ancillary services like jewelry cleaning, repair, and watch battery replacement. Customers can also buy and sell items through their eBay store. The company advertises a promotional rate of 13% interest for the first 13 days of new pawn loans.

Arizona EZ-Pawn differentiates itself through claims of personalized "white glove" customer service, free jewelry cleaning for customers, expert repair services, and convenient multi-channel access including a mobile app and eBay marketplace. The company emphasizes its decade-long operational history and local market presence in the Sun City and Peoria communities.

As a pawn shop, Arizona EZ-Pawn provides liquidity for customers who need fast cash but may lack traditional credit access. However, pawn loans carry inherent risks including loss of collateral if loans aren't repaid, and the promotional 13% rate applies only to the first 13 days—full terms and rates beyond that period are not disclosed on the website. Customers should carefully review complete loan terms before pawning valuable items.
address: 9421 W Bell Rd #101, Sun City, AZ 85351

company_info.headquarters: 9421 W Bell Rd #101, Sun City, AZ 85351

pros: Two convenient locations in Sun City and Peoria with extended accessibility
Promotional 13% interest rate for first 13 days of pawn loans
Free jewelry cleaning service included for customers
Expert in-house repair services for jewelry and watches
Mobile app available on iOS and Android for convenient access
Active eBay store for remote shopping and selling options
Established 13+ year operating history with local market presence
cons: Full loan terms, rates, and repayment periods beyond promotional 13 days are not disclosed on website
Risk of losing collateral if pawn loan cannot be repaid
Limited transparency on interest rates and loan terms for non-promotional periods
No information provided about credit requirements or eligibility criteria
Pawn loans are not a sustainable long-term financial solution and carry higher effective costs than traditional lending
best_for: Individuals needing immediate cash who have valuable items to pledge as collateral
People selling jewelry, gold, firearms, or collectibles for quick cash
Customers seeking jewelry repair or cleaning services in the Sun City/Peoria area
diagnosis: Arizona EZ-Pawn is best for individuals with valuable items who need same-day or next-day cash and are willing to pledge collateral as security. The primary caveat is that pawn loans involve collateral risk, and full interest rates and terms beyond the promotional period are not disclosed online—customers must contact the shop directly to understand complete loan costs.
services: Pawn loans with instant cash funding
Gold and jewelry buying and selling
In-person retail shopping at two locations
Promotional pawn loan rates (13% first 13 days)
